zh.lifeSummary: Hugh Shirley是Thomas Shirley和Isabel Meynell的兒子，於大約1362年出生在英國英格蘭。他於1385年與Beatrice Braose在英國英格蘭素可維斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1400年登記服兵役。他於1400年被列為master of the king's hawks。他去世於1403年7月22日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hugh Shirley是Thomas Shirley和Isabel Meynell的儿子，于大约1362年出生在英国英格兰。他于1385年与Beatrice Braose在英国英格兰素可維斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1400年登记服兵役。他于1400年被列为master of the king's hawks。他去世于1403年7月22日在英国英格兰史洛普爾史福斯波利享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Shirley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so named, such as Shirley (Warwickshire), Shirley in Millbrook (Hampshire), Shirley (Surrey), Shirley in Owston (Yorkshire), and Shirley (Derbyshire). The placenames probably derive from Old English scīr ‘bright’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’, though some may have scīr ‘district, shire’ as the initial element if they lie on a boundary; for example, the Warwickshire place lies on the Warwickshire-Worcestershire boundary. The name Shirley first appears in Ireland in the late 17th century, following the granting of lands to a Shirley family in the barony of Farney, Monaghan.

History: William Shirley (1694–1771) was born in Sussex, England, and came to MA in 1731. He rose in the colonial service, was appointed governor in 1741, and was responsible for the British capture of the French fortress of Louisbourg, Cape Breton Island, in 1745.

variants.name: Sherley
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Shirley  .
Americanized form of Norwegian Sjøli or Sjølie: habitational name from a farmstead named with sjø ‘sea, lake’ + li ‘hillside’.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: Hugh Shirley was born about 1362, in England, United Kingdom as the son of Thomas Shirley and Isabel Meynell. He married Beatrice Braose in 1385, in Wiston, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. He registered for military service in 1400. In 1400, his occupation is listed as master of the king's hawks. He died on 22 July 1403, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Hugh Shirley est né environ 1362, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Thomas Shirley et Isabel Meynell. Il a épousé Beatrice Braose en 1385, à Wiston, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1400. En 1400, sa profession de son indiquée est master of the king's hawks. Il est décédé le 22 juillet 1403, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Hugh Shirley wurde um 1362 in England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Thomas Shirley und Isabel Meynell geboren. Er hat 1385 in Wiston, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Beatrice Braose geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er hat sich 1400 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1400 ist sein Beruf als master of the king's hawks aufgeführt. Er starb am 22. Juli 1403 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Hugh Shirley è nato il circa 1362 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Thomas Shirley e Isabel Meynell. Lui sposato Beatrice Braose nel 1385, nel Wiston, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1400. Nel 1400, la sua occupazione è indicata come master of the king's hawks. Morì il 22 luglio 1403, nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Shirleyは約1362年にイギリスイギリスでThomas ShirleyとIsabel Meynellの息子として生まれた。1385年にイギリスイギリススセックスウィストンでBeatrice Braoseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1400年に兵役登録をした。1400年，職業はmaster of the king's hawksと記録されている。彼は1403年7月22日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Shirley(은)는 대략 1362년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Thomas Shirley(와)과 Isabel Meynell의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 와이스턴에서 Beatrice Braose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1400년, 그의 직업은 master of the king's hawks이었다. 그는 1403년 7월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hugh Shirley nasceu aproximadamente 1362, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Thomas Shirley e Isabel Meynell. Ele casou-se com Beatrice Braose em 1385, em Wiston, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1400. Em 1400, sua profissão aparece como master of the king's hawks. Ele faleceu em 22 de julho de 1403, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Hugh Shirley родился около 1362 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Thomas Shirley и Isabel Meynell. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice Braose в 1385 г. в местности вистон, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. В 1400 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1400 годуработал по профессии master of the king's hawks. Он умер 22 июля 1403 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Hugh Shirley nació aproximadamente 1362, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Thomas Shirley y Isabel Meynell. Se casó con Beatrice Braose en 1385, en Wiston, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1400. En 1400, su ocupación registrada era master of the king's hawks. Murió el 22 de julio de 1403, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años.
